content:
Their winning response is saved and becomes a challenge for next year’s class.
A team defeats The Minotaur by constructing a postmodern “maze” of meaning.
Their final work becomes a template for a future creative writing challenge.


📜 Final Challenge – The “Hero’s Reckoning”
✔ At the end of the semester, the class collectively determines which players deserve legendary status.
✔ Those players may compose the final “literary legend” for the class.
✔ This final legend may appear as an optional challenge in future semesters.
context: From document: RPG Character System (Fully Integrated into Weekly Modules) — chunk 238 (chunk 238/555)
